---
name: Provider Adapter
about: Request or contribute a new provider adapter
title: "[Provider] "
labels: provider-adapter
assignees: ''
---

**Provider name**
Name and link to the AI coding agent.

**Data directory**
Where the agent stores session data (e.g. `~/.agent-name/`).

**Log format**
How the agent logs session output (JSONL, JSON, text, etc.).

**CLI interface**
How sessions are launched from the command line.

**Approval mechanism**
Does the agent support tool-use approval hooks? If so, how?

**Are you willing to implement this?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to contribute the adapter
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it

**Additional context**
Links to documentation, SDK references, etc.
